
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=ÁôłšłĎ|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichŇę|p=gu«źch«íu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=k ∑e…™ŐĮ¬≤¬Ļ  ą ā įo äŐĮ|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=k ∑…źi ts į…źuŐĮ|mc=kjw…®j t ā įjuw|oc-bs=k ∑e Ē  ą ā įu Ē|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Ox also known as  Kinoe-Ushi''' (ÁôłšłĎ, „ĀŅ„Āö„Āģ„Ā®„ĀÜ„Āó, „Āć„Āô„ĀĄ„Āģ„ĀÜ„Āó, „Āć„Ā°„āÖ„ĀÜ) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|Ś£¨Ś≠ź|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=Ś£¨Ś≠ź|4=zh|5=Ś£¨Ś≠ź|6=ko|7=žěĄžěź|lt_ko=žěĄžěź|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|KŇć-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|ÁĒ≤ŚĮÖ|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=ÁĒ≤ŚĮÖ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇć-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (Áôł)|ja|Áôł|zh|Áôł|gan|Áôł|hak|Kui (thi√™n-k√īn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|vi|Qu√Ĺ (Thi√™n can)|wuu|Áôł|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|K√ļi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|Áôł|zh|Áôł|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|qid=Q599644|lt=Ox (šłĎ)|1=Ox (zodiac)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|šļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥#ÁõłŚČčÔľą„ĀĚ„ĀÜ„Āď„ĀŹÔľČ|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Ox (ÁôłšłĎ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gu«źch«íu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: kichi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (Í≥Ąž∂ē)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): Qu√Ĺ SŠĽ≠u

==Years of Yin Water Ox==
Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi'''
|-
! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* {{ill|53|en|53|qid=Q4640335|lt=53|1=53}}
* {{ill|113|en|113|qid=Q416664|lt=113|1=113}}
* {{ill|173|en|173|qid=Q30344|lt=173|1=173}}
* {{ill|233|en|233|qid=Q31237|lt=233|1=233}}
* {{ill|293|en|293|qid=Q33318|lt=293|1=293}}
* {{ill|353|en|353|qid=Q32275|lt=353|1=353}}
* {{ill|413|en|413|qid=Q31510|lt=413|1=413}}
* {{ill|473|en|473|qid=Q31611|lt=473|1=473}}
* {{ill|533|en|533|qid=Q30482|lt=533|1=533}}
* {{ill|593|en|593|qid=Q33889|lt=593|1=593}}
* {{ill|653|en|653|qid=Q30094|lt=653|1=653}}
* {{ill|713|en|713|qid=Q23523|lt=713|1=713}}
* {{ill|773|en|773|qid=Q31131|lt=773|1=773}}
* {{ill|833|en|833|qid=Q30377|lt=833|1=833}}
* {{ill|893|en|893|qid=Q24762|lt=893|1=893}}
* {{ill|953|en|953|qid=Q23586|lt=953|1=953}}
|
* {{ill|1013|en|1013|qid=Q19241|lt=1013|1=1013}}
* {{ill|1073|en|1073|qid=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}}
* {{ill|1133|en|1133|qid=Q19586|lt=1133|1=1133}}
* {{ill|1193|en|1193|qid=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}}
* {{ill|1253|en|1253|qid=Q5498|lt=1253|1=1253}}
* {{ill|1313|en|1313|qid=Q5735|lt=1313|1=1313}}
* {{ill|1373|en|1373|qid=Q6261|lt=1373|1=1373}}
* {{ill|1433|en|1433|qid=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}}
* {{ill|1493|en|1493|qid=Q6687|lt=1493|1=1493}}
* {{ill|1553|en|1553|qid=Q6568|lt=1553|1=1553}}
* {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}}
* {{ill|1673|en|1673|qid=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}}
* {{ill|1733|en|1733|qid=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}}
* {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}}
* {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}}
* {{ill|1913|en|1913|qid=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}}
* {{ill|1973|en|1973|qid=Q2477|lt=1973|1=1973}}
|
* {{ill|2033|en|2033|qid=Q12786|lt=2033|1=2033}}
* {{ill|2093|en|2093|qid=Q972053|lt=2093|1=2093}}
* [[:en:2153|2153]]
* {{ill|2213|en|2213|qid=Q47413739|lt=2213|1=2213}}
* [[:en:2273|2273]]
* [[:en:2333|2333]]
* [[:en:2393|2393]]
* [[:en:2453|2453]]
* [[2513]]
* [[2573]]
* [[:en:2633|2633]]
* [[2693]]
* [[2753]]
* [[2813]]
* [[2873]]
* [[:en:2933|2933]]
* [[:en:2993|2993]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Ox==
The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems Ś£¨ or šłĀ) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|qid=Q1190989|lt=ShŇćkan|1=Xiaohan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|qid=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) in traditional contexts.

==Days of Yin Water Ox==
=== Auspicious Dates ===
Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|ŚÖęŚįā|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Ox|qq=ja|ÁôłšłĎ|version=84123844|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q267521|af|Wateros (astrologie)|cdo|GŇ≠i-tiŇę|de|Wasser-B√ľffel|hak|Kui-chhi√ļ|ja|ÁôłšłĎ|ko|Í≥Ąž∂ē|vi|Qu√Ĺ SŠĽ≠u|za|Gveiqcouj|zh-min-nan|K√Ļi-thi√ļ|zh-yue|ÁôłšłĎ|zh|ÁôłšłĎ|zh-min-nan|Teng-chh√°u|zh-yue|šłĀŚ∑≥|cdo|Dń≠ng-cŠĻ≥ŐĄde|nds|Metall-Schlangeni|de|Yin Water Ox|en|Water Ox|fr|Buffle de eau|af|Metaalslang (astrologie)|de|Metall-Schlangeni|en|Metal Snake|fr|Serpent de m√©talboishak|it|Ding-chŠĻ≥ŐĀid|ko|ž†ēžā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|vi|ńźinh TŠĽĶ|za|Dingceij|zh|šłĀŚ∑≥|ar|Yin Water Ox}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
